As a **user_type** I'd like to **feature_verb** to/for **feature_purpose_description**

## Acceptance criteria

### Successful flow
Sequence of steps (user requests or system responses) involved in the expected case of the feature functioning correctly.

### Error or exception cases
Enumeration of cases where the system might fail to respond correctly, include retry policy or error message specification.

## Belongs to
Link to parent Item (Epic or Sprint)
